'''âp-r-d-s''' ('''kapardesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lade|lade]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-r-d-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lade|lade]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-r-d-s
|-
! Lemma
| kapardesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== Subject agreement ===
''Object fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thipardesoko || jipardesoko || shipardesoko || kipardesoko
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthupardesoko || jujupardesoko || shushupardesoko || kukupardesoko
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thupardesoko || jupardesoko || shupardesoko || kupardesoko
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thupardesoko || jupardesoko || shupardesoko || kupardesoko
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothopardesoko || jojopardesoko || shoshopardesoko || kokopardesoko
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thopardesoko || jopardesoko || shopardesoko || kopardesoko
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || pardesoko || pardesoko || pardesoko || pardesoko
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thĂŠpardesoko || jĂŠpardesoko || shĂŠpardesoko || kĂŠpardesoko
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathapardesoko || jajapardesoko || shashapardesoko || kakapardesoko
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thapardesoko || japardesoko || shapardesoko || kapardesoko
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thapardesoko || japardesoko || shapardesoko || kapardesoko
|}

''Subject fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
